actionsRun: Opened /WEA/routines and /WEA/goals in agent-browser session 90954350c057__u1 and captured annotated screenshots.
Ran read-only DOM class audits for hardcoded color tokens and shadow classes on the Routines, Goals, and GoalDetail surfaces.
Switched the Routines page from Papierklammer to Earth using the sidebar theme controls and recorded pre/post screenshots plus computed CSS variables.
Verified key local API responses with curl for routines/goals detail endpoints, including the failing /api/routines/new route.

assertions.title: Routines page uses design system colors

steps.expected: Routines page renders with design-system styling
steps.observed: Routines page rendered the empty state with JetBrains Mono styling and no visual regressions.

steps.action: Audit rendered DOM classes for hardcoded amber/emerald/green/yellow/blue/cyan/red tokens and shadow classes
steps.expected: No hardcoded Tailwind semantic color or shadow classes remain on the rendered page
steps.observed: DOM audit returned an empty match set ([]).

steps.action: Inspect browser errors and network activity
steps.expected: No browser errors; routines data request succeeds
steps.observed: No console/page errors surfaced. GET /api/companies/fe22e791-2c82-4f79-9e78-f2a908e8e272/routines returned 200 and the seeded list was empty.

assertions.title: RoutineDetail page uses design system colors

steps.action: Attempt to reach the RoutineDetail/create surface from the routines area
steps.expected: Routine detail/create form should render so its themed styling can be validated
steps.observed: The seeded routines list was empty, so I opened /WEA/routines/new directly to reach the create/detail surface.

steps.expected: Routine detail/create page renders with design-system colors
steps.observed: The route did not render the detail UI; the accessibility snapshot exposed an 'Internal server error' message instead.
GET /api/routines/new returned 500 with body {"error":"Internal server error"}.

evidence.consoleErrors: none surfaced in agent-browser; failure appeared as an in-page 'Internal server error' state

assertions.issues: RoutineDetail could not be validated for design-system compliance because the route itself fails to load and returns an internal server error.

assertions.title: Goals and GoalDetail pages use design system

steps.expected: Goals page renders with themed design-system styling
steps.observed: Goals page rendered a themed list with the seeded company goal visible.

steps.action: Open the seeded goal detail page
steps.expected: GoalDetail renders with theme-aware shadcn/design-system components
steps.observed: GoalDetail loaded successfully at /WEA/goals/e5d6f5ec-1b90-416e-805d-c7d99e5c86f7 with themed tabs and status chips.

steps.action: Audit rendered DOM classes and inspect styles
steps.expected: No hardcoded semantic Tailwind color or shadow classes remain on the rendered Goals/GoalDetail surfaces
steps.observed: DOM audits for both Goals and GoalDetail returned no hardcoded semantic color/shadow class matches, and computed styles showed theme-driven colors.

assertions.title: Theme switching works on newly styled pages

steps.expected: Routines page renders in the Papierklammer theme
steps.observed: The page rendered with html[data-theme=papierklammer] and CSS variable --bg resolved to #C4878E.

steps.action: Click the EARTH theme button in the sidebar footer
steps.expected: Theme changes on the same page without a reload
steps.observed: The Routines page stayed in place and the footer theme control switched the active theme.

steps.action: Inspect post-switch CSS variables and visuals
steps.expected: Routines page colors change to the Earth palette
steps.observed: html[data-theme] changed to earth and CSS variables changed to --bg #2D1610 and --fg #E8E0D0; annotated screenshots show the palette shift from rose to brown/ivory.

evidence.network: No extra theme-switch API call was required; the theme changed client-side on /WEA/routines.

frictions.description: The seeded Routines page had no existing routines, so there was no in-list detail link to use for RoutineDetail validation.
frictions.resolution: Used the create/detail route /WEA/routines/new to validate the surface directly.

summary: Tested 4 browser assertions for Cluster 1 pages and cross-theme behavior: 3 passed and 1 failed. The failure is VAL-GUI-EXP-C1-002 because /WEA/routines/new shows an internal server error backed by GET /api/routines/new -> 500.
